stellar-core.name: Stellar Core
stellar-core.description: Core Stellar Network concepts: accounts, assets, operations, fees, and protocol fundamentals

soroban.name: Soroban Smart Contracts
soroban.description: Soroban smart contract development with Rust/WASM — contracts, storage, testing, and security patterns

apis.name: APIs & Data
apis.description: Stellar RPC, Horizon (legacy), and data access patterns for querying the Stellar network

frontend.name: Frontend & Wallets
frontend.description: Frontend integration with Stellar — wallet connections, transaction signing, and browser SDK patterns

payments.name: Payments & Anchors
payments.description: Payment flows, x402 micropayments, SEP standards, and fiat on/off-ramp integration via anchors

tools.name: Developer Tools
tools.description: Stellar CLI, SDKs, Scaffold Stellar, and essential development tooling for the Stellar ecosystem

defi.name: DeFi
defi.description: Decentralized finance on Stellar — DEX, AMM, liquidity pools, and DeFi protocol patterns

ai-agents.name: AI & Agent Integration
ai-agents.description: MCP servers, AI-assisted development tools, and agent integration patterns for Stellar

security.name: Security
security.description: Smart contract security, audit checklists, OpenZeppelin on Stellar, and secure coding patterns

community.name: Community & Learning
community.description: Contributing guides, learning resources, hackathon tips, and Nearx community materials

skills.name: dex-amm
skills.description: Stellar built-in DEX and AMM — order books, manage offers, path payments, liquidity pools. Use when trading on Stellar or building DEX integrations. Do NOT use for external DeFi protocols or Soroban-based DEXes.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: frontend-integration
skills.description: Frontend integration with Stellar — wallet connections, transaction signing, React patterns, and browser SDK usage. Use when building web apps on Stellar. Do NOT use for backend services or CLI tools.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: horizon-legacy
skills.description: Horizon REST API for classic Stellar operations — accounts, transactions, effects, streaming. Use when maintaining legacy integrations. Do NOT use for new projects — prefer Stellar RPC.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: mcp-servers
skills.description: MCP servers for Stellar — Model Context Protocol integrations, XDR decoder, AI-assisted development. Use when setting up AI agent tooling for Stellar. Do NOT use for general MCP development or non-Stellar MCP servers.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: nearx-contributing-guide
skills.description: Guide for Nearx community members to contribute skills to this repository. Use when adding a new skill or understanding the contribution process. Do NOT use for using existing skills.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: seps-anchors
skills.description: Stellar SEP standards and anchor ecosystem — SEP-6, SEP-10, SEP-24, SEP-31, stellar.toml, fiat on/off-ramps. Use when integrating with anchors or implementing SEP flows. Do NOT use for general Stellar operations or smart contracts.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: smart-contract-security
skills.description: Smart contract security on Stellar — OpenZeppelin contracts, audit patterns, common vulnerabilities. Use when securing Soroban contracts or preparing for audits. Do NOT use for general web security.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: soroban-contracts
skills.description: Soroban smart contract development — Rust/WASM contracts, storage, auth, cross-contract calls, deployment. Use when writing, deploying, or invoking Soroban contracts. Do NOT use for classic Stellar operations or frontend integration.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: soroban-security
skills.description: Soroban smart contract security patterns — access control, reentrancy, integer safety, auth best practices. Use when auditing or securing Soroban contracts. Do NOT use for general web security or classic Stellar security.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: soroban-testing
skills.description: Testing Soroban smart contracts — unit tests, integration tests, testnet deployment, Stellar CLI testing. Use when writing tests or debugging contracts. Do NOT use for frontend testing or general test frameworks.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-accounts
skills.description: Stellar account model — keypairs, funding, signers, sponsorship, and minimum balances. Use when creating accounts, managing signers, or understanding the Stellar account model. Do NOT use for Soroban contract accounts or smart wallet patterns.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-assets
skills.description: Stellar asset issuance, trustlines, custom tokens, and Stellar Asset Contract (SAC). Use when issuing tokens, managing trustlines, or bridging classic assets to Soroban. Do NOT use for Soroban-native tokens or general smart contract development.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-cli
skills.description: Stellar CLI — contract management, key management, network configuration, and development workflows. Use when working with the Stellar CLI tool. Do NOT use for JavaScript SDK or frontend development.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-fees
skills.description: Stellar fee model — base fees, resource fees, surge pricing, and fee strategies. Use when optimizing transaction costs or understanding fee mechanics. Do NOT use for Soroban-specific resource metering.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-operations
skills.description: All Stellar transaction operations — Payment, CreateAccount, ManageOffers, PathPayment, and more. Use when building or submitting transactions. Do NOT use for Soroban contract invocations.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-rpc
skills.description: Stellar RPC JSON-RPC API — simulateTransaction, sendTransaction, getTransaction, getEvents, getLedgerEntries. Use when interacting with the Stellar network programmatically. Do NOT use for Horizon REST API.
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: stellar-sdks
skills.description: Stellar SDKs — JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust client libraries for interacting with the Stellar network. Use when choosing or using an SDK. Do NOT use for contract development (see soroban-contracts).
skills.author: nearx

skills.name: x402-stellar
skills.description: x402 HTTP micropayments on Stellar — pay-per-request APIs using HTTP 402, Soroban token transfers, facilitator pattern. Use when building pay-per-use APIs or machine payments. Do NOT use for general payment flows or EVM x402.
skills.author: nearx
